# Unban Solutions

> Independent professional assessment, appeal preparation and assistance for restricted, suspended or compromised social media accounts. Platform decisions cannot be guaranteed.

Unban Solutions supports individuals, creators and businesses with account restrictions, suspensions, compromised profiles and related social media platform issues. Services are available in Bulgarian and English.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.unbansolutions.com/): Overview of Unban Solutions and the account issues it handles.
- [Services](https://www.unbansolutions.com/services): Case assessment, appeal preparation, compromised-account assistance and preventive audits.
- [Pricing](https://www.unbansolutions.com/pricing): Service options, prices and the scope included in each option.
- [Process](https://www.unbansolutions.com/process): How case assessment, evidence collection, appeal preparation and follow-up work.
- [Blog](https://www.unbansolutions.com/blog): Guidance and updates about social media account restrictions and recovery.
- [Contact](https://www.unbansolutions.com/contact): Submit a case for an initial assessment.

## Policies

- [Terms](https://www.unbansolutions.com/terms): Terms for using the website and engaging services.
- [Payments and refunds](https://www.unbansolutions.com/payments-and-refunds): Payment, withdrawal and refund conditions.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.unbansolutions.com/privacy-policy): How personal data is collected and processed.

## Direct contact

- Website: [www.unbansolutions.com](https://www.unbansolutions.com/)
- Phone: +359 883 391 411
- Email: [support@unbansolutions.com](mailto:support@unbansolutions.com)
- Address: 18 Shipchenski Prohod Blvd., Sofia, Bulgaria
- Languages: Bulgarian and English
